description: An IT auditor reviews the process for tracking IT assets like laptops and servers.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the complete IT asset inventory from the asset management system.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor has the master list of all recorded IT assets.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of 30 assets from the list and perform a physical verification to ensure they exist and are in the correct location.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor finds that 3 of the sampled laptops cannot be located.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a more frequent cycle of physical inventory counts to improve the accuracy of the asset inventory.

expected_outcome.value: A recommendation is made to improve the asset tracking process.
